# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
services:
  - name: my-service
    url: http://my-backend-service
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: ["https://example.com", "https://api.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
          headers: ["Authorization", "Content-Type"]
        enabled: true

  - name: another-service
    url: http://another-backend-service
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names: ["api_key"]
        enabled: true

routes:
  - service: my-service
    paths: ["/v1/*"]
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          hour_limit: 500
          minute_limit: 100
        enabled: true

plugins:
  global:
    - name: acl
      config:
        allow: ["consumer_group_1", "consumer_group_2"]
